attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who exploits technical descents and time trial power to establish gaps. Capable of sustaining efforts in small groups deep into finales (sub-1km).
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in breakaways, relying on individual time trial strength rather than team support. Positioned to capitalize on selective racing rather than controlled leadouts.
terrain_preference: Technical descents where TT power and bike handling combine effectively. Flat-to-rolling finales that reward sustained threshold efforts. Surprisingly capable on cobbled classics despite TT specialist profile.
vulnerability: Lacks sprint speed for reduced bunch finishes. Vulnerable when peloton commits to organized chase in final kilometers, as pure power cannot compensate for numbers.
key_patterns: Uses oversized gearing (62-tooth) on descents to maximize time trial advantage over puncheurs
Excels in late-race breakaway scenarios, maintaining gaps under extreme pressure inside final kilometer
TT specialist profile allows competitive results in cobbled classics, defying traditional archetypes
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Tour showed improved ability to sustain breakaway efforts under maximum pressure compared to 2022 classics
